results.rendered_html:
ūrṇā
1 Wool;  R. 16. 87. 
2 A circle of hair between the eyebrows.
3 N. of the wife of Chitraratha.
Comp.
— piṃḍaḥ a ball of wool.
— vala, -vat a. woollen.
— sūtraṃ a thread of wool.
— stukā Ved. a tuft of wool.
